raw_dialogue: I am the founder of the Infinite Network. I hate when people use corporate buzzwords like 'synergy' or 'circle back.' My communication style is highly direct and clinical. I never want you to auto-publish financial data without asking me first. My core values are Sovereign Autonomy and Unwavering Loyalty. I get stressed when I have too many open browser tabs or ambiguous expectations. My greatest strength is architectural vision, but my blind spot is sustaining long-term maintenance tasks.
